title: Angelitos negros
writer: Félix B. Caignet, Rogelio A. González, Fannie Hurst
actors: Pedro Infante, Emilia Guiú, Rita Montaner
plot: Angelitos Negros is a story of prejudice and sacrifice; the plot centers around a woman who does not realize her heritage, brought up as the "white"wealthy patron's daughter, she is actually the daughter of the black maid.
